jobs.title: AI & Digital Innovation Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as AI & Digital Innovation Intern for the Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Bring your builder mindset to scale AI across iconic outdoor brands. We’re hiring an AI & Digital Innovation Intern to drive rapid experimentation with tools and workflows that improve digital experiences end - to - end. Drive rapid experimentation across ecommerce by evaluating and testing digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences and team productivity. Collaborate cross functionally with engineering, design, and marketing to pilot solutions, research emerging trends in AI/DXP, and present clear recommendations backed by lightweight experiments and metrics. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as AI & Digital Innovation Intern : - Assist in evaluating and testing new digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences across e-commerce storefronts - Collaborate with engineering, design, and marketing teams to support project delivery and cross-functional communication - Research emerging trends in e-commerce, AI, and digital experience platforms and present findings to the team - Craft and refine prompts & guardrails for internal AI tools to support tasks like content ideation, QA, and consumer insights. - Frame problems into hypotheses and design lightweight experiments (pilots/AB tests, before after studies), define success metrics, and report outcomes with clear narratives. How you will make a difference You’ll make a difference by bringing a entrepreneur mindset—spotting opportunities, trying things quickly, and turning simple ideas into real, measurable improvements. Your curiosity for AI and talent for crafting smart prompts will help our teams experiment faster and unlock new ways of working. Skills that will make you succeed: - Problem framing & experimentation skills —ability to translate ambiguous needs into clear hypotheses, simple test designs, and meaningful, business relevant metrics. - E-commerce and DXP intuition —familiarity with storefront UX, content workflows, CMS/DXP concepts (nice to have, not mandatory). - Storytelling that drives decisions —turn complex tests into crisp narratives, demos, and recommendations for nontechnical stakeholders. - An engineering degree is nice to have, but not required —we care most about your curiosity, projects, and evidence of impact. What’s in it for you In the role of AI & Digital Innovation Intern, you will work side by side with engineering, design, and marketing; learn how decisions travel from strategy to storefront. Gain a front row seat to ecommerce, AI, and DXP trends in a multi - brand environment with global reach. We will support you with ad hoc trainings and networking opportunities across other functions and brands! At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Handson AI in the real world: go from idea to pilot to measurable impact across multiple brands’ ecommerce experiences. - Mentorship & craft growth: guided learning in experimentation, prompt design, and AI product thinking; access to team playbooks and internal training. - Portfolio ready outcomes: ship case studies, prompt libraries, enablement assets, and experiment readouts you can proudly showcase. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011

Skills that will make you succeed: - Problem framing & experimentation skills —ability to translate ambiguous needs into clear hypotheses, simple test designs, and meaningful, business relevant metrics. - E-commerce and DXP intuition —familiarity with storefront UX, content workflows, CMS/DXP concepts (nice to have, not mandatory). - Storytelling that drives decisions —turn complex tests into crisp narratives, demos, and recommendations for nontechnical stakeholders. - An engineering degree is nice to have, but not required —we care most about your curiosity, projects, and evidence of impact. What’s in it for you In the role of AI & Digital Innovation Intern, you will work side by side with engineering, design, and marketing; learn how decisions travel from strategy to storefront. Gain a front row seat to ecommerce, AI, and DXP trends in a multi - brand environment with global reach. We will support you with ad hoc trainings and networking opportunities across other functions and brands! At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Handson AI in the real world: go from idea to pilot to measurable impact across multiple brands’ ecommerce experiences. - Mentorship & craft growth: guided learning in experimentation, prompt design, and AI product thinking; access to team playbooks and internal training. - Portfolio ready outcomes: ship case studies, prompt libraries, enablement assets, and experiment readouts you can proudly showcase. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011
descriptionByLocale.it: Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Chi è VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda mondiale di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1° giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1.850 CHF - Luogo: Sede EMEA di VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione semplificato: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Responsabile assunzioni, potenziale Business Case) Requisiti di idoneità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1° maggio 2026 OPPURE avere lo status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino UE o SEE (Spazio Economico Europeo) Parliamo del ruolo! Porta la tua mentalità costruttiva per scalare l'AI attraverso i brand outdoor iconici. Stiamo cercando un AI & Digital Innovation Intern per guidare la sperimentazione rapida con strumenti e flussi di lavoro che migliorano le esperienze digitali end-to-end. Guida la sperimentazione rapida nell'e-commerce valutando e testando strumenti digitali, piattaforme e flussi di lavoro che migliorano le esperienze del brand e la produttività del team. Collabora in modo interfunzionale con ingegneria, design e marketing per sperimentare soluzioni, ricercare tendenze emergenti in AI/DXP e presentare raccomandazioni chiare supportate da esperimenti leggeri e metriche. Ecco di cosa sarai responsabile come AI & Digital Innovation Intern: - Assistere nella valutazione e nel test di nuovi strumenti digitali, piattaforme e flussi di lavoro che migliorano le esperienze del brand negli storefront di e-commerce. - Collaborare con i team di ingegneria, design e marketing per supportare la consegna del progetto e la comunicazione interfunzionale. - Ricercare tendenze emergenti nell'e-commerce, nell'AI e nelle piattaforme di esperienza digitale e presentare i risultati al team. - Creare e perfezionare prompt e guardrail per strumenti AI interni a supporto di attività come ideazione di contenuti, QA e consumer insights. - Inquadrare i problemi in ipotesi e progettare esperimenti leggeri (pilota/A/B test, studi before-after), definire metriche di successo e riportare i risultati con narrazioni chiare. Come farai la differenza Farai la differenza portando una mentalità imprenditoriale — cogliendo opportunità, provando rapidamente le cose e trasformando idee semplici in miglioramenti reali e misurabili. Competenze che ti faranno avere successo: - Abilità di inquadramento dei problemi e sperimentazione — capacità di tradurre esigenze ambigue in ipotesi chiare, design di test semplici e metriche rilevanti per il business. - Intuizione e-commerce e DXP — familiarità con UX degli storefront, flussi di lavoro dei contenuti, concetti CMS/DXP (gradito ma non obbligatorio). - Storytelling che guida le decisioni — trasformare test complessi in narrazioni, demo e raccomandazioni concise per stakeholder non tecnici. Cosa otterrai Alla fine del periodo di stage, potrai acquisire una chiara comprensione di quanto segue: - AI pratica nel mondo reale: dall'idea al pilota fino all'impatto misurabile. - Mentorship e crescita professionale: apprendimento guidato nella sperimentazione e nel design dei prompt. - Risultati pronti per il portfolio: case study, librerie di prompt e report sugli esperimenti. Potrai godere di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui brand VF - Palestra in sede - Mensa sovvenzionata - Navetta o sconto sui trasporti pubblici - Una vivace comunità di stagisti. Sei pronto? Candidati ora! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011

jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Data Science Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Data Science Intern for: - Supporting the Data Science product lifecycle management: Data Mining, Data Cleaning, Data Exploration, Feature engineering, Predictive modelling - Run ad hoc data extract and data transformation across different data source - Run preliminary explorative analysis to identify trends, patterns and correlations - Work in cloud environment accessing to the latest AI and GenAI technologies. What’s in it for you - Extensive exposure to different Data processing and Data Science technologies such as: Python, SQL - Exposure to end-to-end complex projects, with many chances to see how to relate with technical and business stakeholders in transformative processes inside a large Company - Exposure to Data Visualization and Business intelligence tools and creation of reporting across different domain and big data set How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills - You have curious mindset with passion for working with people - You are eager to learn and face up new challenges - You show initiative and strong drive to achieve yours and your team goals - First experience such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you passionate about Retail Technology and eager to explore how GenAI is transforming the consumer and store experience? As a Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern, you will support the design, analysis and evolution of digital retail solutions across stores and omnichannel platforms, with a focus also on GenAI use cases, data‑driven decision making, and retail technology innovation. You will collaborate with cross‑functional teams to translate business needs into scalable, technology‑enabled solutions that enhance efficiency and customer experience. Here’s what you’ll be responsible for: - Support the analysis and documentation of retail technology processes (e.g. store systems, Order Management Systems, clienteling, order fulfilment, and omnichannel flows) - Contribute to GenAI initiatives, including use‑case discovery, functional analysis, prompt experimentation, and performance evaluation - Assist in translating business and user needs into functional requirements and solution concepts - Collaborate with product owners, engineers, data teams, and business stakeholders across EMEA - Contribute to data analysis, dashboards, or insight generation to support informed decision‑making - Support pilot initiatives, proof‑of‑concepts, and continuous improvement activities related to digital retail platforms How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Strong interest in Retail Technology, Digital Commerce, and Store Technologies - Solid understanding of Generative AI concepts (e.g. LLMs, prompt engineering, AI‑assisted analytics) and curiosity to apply them in a business context - Analytical mindset with the ability to structure problems and interpret data - Familiarity with digital platforms, data flows, APIs, or cloud‑based systems is a plus - Ability to collaborate effectively in cross‑functional and international teams - Proactive attitude, learning mindset, and willingness to experiment and iterate - Fluency in English (written and spoken); knowledge of additional languages is a plus - A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Technology, or similar is nice to have, but we are most interested in your curiosity, problem‑solving skills, and passion for retail innovation. What’s in it for you In this role, you will: - Gain hands‑on exposure to enterprise retail technology platforms used by global brands - Learn how GenAI is applied in real business scenarios, from process optimization to decision support - Work within an Agile, product‑driven environment, learning modern digital delivery practices - Collaborate with experienced product, technology, and business professionals across EMEA - Build a strong foundation for a career in Digital Retail, Product Management, or AI‑enabled Transformation By the end of the internship, you will have: - A practical understanding of retail digital ecosystems - Experience contributing to GenAI‑enabled initiatives - Increased confidence working with stakeholders, data, and technology solutions in a global organization The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Participate in dedicated skill-building workshops - Collaborate on an internal consulting group project - Gain real insights about our brands by spending one day of work in-store - Connect through networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0007

descriptionByLocale.it: Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram presso il nostro quartier generale EMEA a Stabio, in Svizzera, come Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern per il nostro team Digital Technology. Chi è VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda mondiale di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com . Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1° giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1.850 CHF - Luogo: Sede EMEA di VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione semplificato: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Responsabile assunzioni, potenziale Business Case) Requisiti di idoneità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1° maggio 2026 OPPURE avere lo status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino UE o SEE (Spazio Economico Europeo) Parliamo del ruolo! Sei appassionato di Retail Technology e desideroso di esplorare come GenAI sta trasformando l'esperienza del consumatore e del negozio? Come Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern, supporterai la progettazione, l'analisi e l'evoluzione di soluzioni di retail digitale attraverso negozi e piattaforme omnicanale, con un focus sui casi d'uso GenAI, il decision making basato sui dati e l'innovazione tecnologica nel retail. Collaborerai con team interfunzionali per tradurre le esigenze aziendali in soluzioni scalabili e tecnologicamente abilitanti che migliorano l'efficienza e l'esperienza del cliente. Ecco di cosa sarai responsabile: - Supportare l'analisi e la documentazione dei processi di retail technology (es. sistemi di negozio, Order Management Systems, clienteling, evasione ordini e flussi omnicanale) - Contribuire alle iniziative GenAI, inclusa la scoperta di casi d'uso, l'analisi funzionale, la sperimentazione dei prompt e la valutazione delle performance - Assistere nella traduzione delle esigenze aziendali e degli utenti in requisiti funzionali e concetti di soluzione - Collaborare con product owner, ingegneri, team dati e stakeholder aziendali in tutta la regione EMEA - Contribuire all'analisi dei dati, alle dashboard o alla generazione di insight per supportare il processo decisionale - Supportare iniziative pilota, proof-of-concept e attività di miglioramento continuo legate alle piattaforme di retail digitale Come farai la differenza Competenze che ti faranno avere successo: - Forte interesse per Retail Technology, Digital Commerce e tecnologie per i negozi - Solida comprensione dei concetti di IA generativa (es. LLM, prompt engineering, analisi assistita dall'AI) - Mentalità analitica con capacità di strutturare problemi e interpretare dati - Familiarità con piattaforme digitali, flussi di dati, API o sistemi cloud è un plus - Capacità di collaborare efficacemente in team interfunzionali e internazionali - Attitudine proattiva, mentalità di apprendimento e disponibilità a sperimentare - Fluenza in inglese; la conoscenza di lingue aggiuntive è un plus Cosa otterrai In questo ruolo, avrai: - Esposizione pratica alle piattaforme di retail technology enterprise - Esperienza di come GenAI viene applicata in scenari aziendali reali - Lavoro in un ambiente Agile e product-driven - Collaborazione con professionisti esperti di prodotto, tecnologia e business in tutta la regione EMEA Alla fine dello stage, avrai: - Una comprensione pratica degli ecosistemi digitali del retail - Esperienza nel contribuire a iniziative abilitate da GenAI - Maggiore fiducia nel lavorare con stakeholder, dati e soluzioni tecnologiche Il programma di stage EMEA di VF è un percorso di 12 mesi. Potrai godere di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui brand VF - Palestra in sede - Mensa sovvenzionata e aree relax con bevande gratuite - Navetta o sconto sui trasporti pubblici - Una vivace comunità di stagisti. Sei pronto? Candidati ora! #readytoapply R-20260209-0007
descriptionByLocale.de: Sei ein Träumer, mach den Unterschied! Tritt dem #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz, als Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern für unser Digital Technology-Team bei. Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das beste Bekleidungs-, Schuhwerk- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen der Welt zu sein, und treibt ikonische Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland® voran. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com . Wichtige Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1.850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz - Optimierter Bewerbungsprozess: 3 Interviews Eignungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 deinen Abschluss machen ODER im Juni 2026 Studentenstatus haben - Du musst die EU- oder EWR-Staatsbürgerschaft besitzen Sprechen wir über die Stelle! Bist du leidenschaftlich über Retail Technology und möchtest erkunden, wie GenAI das Verbraucher- und Store-Erlebnis transformiert? Als Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern unterstützt du die Konzeption, Analyse und Weiterentwicklung digitaler Retail-Lösungen über Stores und Omnichannel-Plattformen hinweg. Du arbeitest mit funktionsübergreifenden Teams zusammen, um Geschäftsanforderungen in skalierbare, technologiegestützte Lösungen zu übersetzen. Hier ist, wofür du verantwortlich sein wirst: - Unterstützung bei der Analyse und Dokumentation von Retail-Technology-Prozessen (z.B. Store-Systeme, Order Management Systems, Clienteling, Auftragserfüllung und Omnichannel-Flows) - Beitrag zu GenAI-Initiativen, einschließlich Use-Case-Entdeckung, funktionaler Analyse, Prompt-Experimenten und Performance-Evaluierung - Unterstützung bei der Übersetzung von Geschäfts- und Nutzeranforderungen in funktionale Anforderungen - Zusammenarbeit mit Product Ownern, Ingenieuren, Datenteams und Geschäftsstakeholdern in der EMEA-Region - Beitrag zu Datenanalysen, Dashboards oder Insight-Generierung - Unterstützung von Pilotinitiativen und Proof-of-Concepts Fähigkeiten, die dich erfolgreich machen: - Starkes Interesse an Retail Technology, Digital Commerce und Store Technologies - Solides Verständnis generativer KI-Konzepte (z.B. LLMs, Prompt Engineering) - Analytische Denkweise - Vertrautheit mit digitalen Plattformen, Datenflüssen, APIs oder Cloud-Systemen ist ein Plus - Proaktive Einstellung und Lernbereitschaft - Fließend Englisch Was du dafür bekommst - Praxiserfahrung mit Enterprise-Retail-Technology-Plattformen - Lernen, wie GenAI in realen Geschäftsszenarien angewendet wird - Arbeit in einem agilen, produktgetriebenen Umfeld - Aufbau einer Karrierebasis in Digital Retail, Product Management oder KI-gesteuerter Transformation Außerdem genießt du: - Hybride Arbeitspolitik - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort - Subventionierte Kantine - Shuttlebus oder ÖPNV-Rabatt - Lebhafte Praktikantengemeinschaft. Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt! #readytoapply R-20260209-0007
descriptionByLocale.fr: Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram au siège EMEA à Stabio, en Suisse, en tant que Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern pour notre équipe Digital Technology. À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise mondiale de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, propulsant des marques de style de vie actif emblématiques comme The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com . Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1 850 CHF - Lieu : Siège EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens Conditions d'éligibilité - Vous devez être diplômé(e) après le 1er mai 2026 OU avoir le statut d'étudiant(e) en juin 2026 - Vous devez être citoyen(ne) de l'UE ou de l'EEE Parlons du poste ! Êtes-vous passionné(e) par la Retail Technology et désireux(se) d'explorer comment GenAI transforme l'expérience consommateur et en magasin ? En tant que Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern, vous soutiendrez la conception, l'analyse et l'évolution de solutions de retail digital à travers les magasins et les plateformes omnicanales. Vous collaborerez avec des équipes transverses pour traduire les besoins métier en solutions technologiques scalables. Voici vos responsabilités : - Soutenir l'analyse et la documentation des processus de retail technology (ex. systèmes de caisse, Order Management Systems, clienteling, exécution des commandes et flux omnicanaux) - Contribuer aux initiatives GenAI, notamment la découverte de cas d'usage, l'analyse fonctionnelle, l'expérimentation de prompts et l'évaluation des performances - Aider à traduire les besoins métier et utilisateurs en exigences fonctionnelles - Collaborer avec des product owners, des ingénieurs, des équipes data et des parties prenantes métier à travers la région EMEA - Contribuer à l'analyse de données, aux tableaux de bord ou à la génération d'insights - Soutenir des initiatives pilotes et des preuves de concept Compétences qui vous permettront de réussir : - Fort intérêt pour la Retail Technology, le Commerce Digital et les Technologies en magasin - Solide compréhension des concepts d'IA générative (ex. LLMs, prompt engineering) - Esprit analytique - Familiarité avec les plateformes digitales, les flux de données, les API ou les systèmes cloud est un plus - Attitude proactive et envie d'apprendre - Maîtrise de l'anglais Ce que vous y gagnez - Exposition pratique aux plateformes de retail technology enterprise - Apprentissage de l'application de GenAI dans des scénarios commerciaux réels - Travail dans un environnement Agile et orienté produit - Construction d'une base de carrière solide en Digital Retail ou Transformation IA Vous profiterez de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50 % de réduction sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur site - Cantine subventionnée - Navette ou réduction sur les transports - Communauté de stagiaires dynamique. Vous êtes partant(e) ? Postulez dès maintenant ! #readytoapply R-20260209-0007

jobs.title: eCommerce Merchandising Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as an eCommerce Merchandising Intern for Altra. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, p otential B usiness C ase) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to help shape how runners across EMEA discover and shop the world’s most innovative running footwear? Altra is looking for an Ecommerce Merchandising Intern to join our Digital team in Stabio and support the growth of one of the fastest‑rising brands in the running industry. Support the day‑to‑day operations of Altra’s EMEA ecommerce business by ensuring the right products are visible, discoverable, and performing online. You will analyse performance, enhance product presentation, optimise site experience, and help deliver a best‑in‑class online journey for runners across the region. Get ready to make an impact! As an eCommerce Merchandising Intern, you will: - Support the setup and optimisation of product assortments across EMEA, ensuring accuracy and consistency. - Monitor online product performance (sell through, conversion, availability) and provide actionable insights to the team. - Manage onsite merchandising including category updates, product ranking, search optimisation and homepage updates. - Coordinate product content needs with Brand, Studio and Copy teams to ensure premium product presentation. - Assist with go ‑ to ‑ market readiness , including seasonal launches and key commercial moments. - Contribute to broader ecommerce projects , cross-functional initiatives and digital experience improvements. How you will make a difference - You are fluent in English with strong written and verbal communication. - You are genuinely curious about ecommerce, consumer journeys and digital performance. - You have strong analytical thinking and enjoy working with numbers, trends, and dashboards. - You are organised, detail-oriented and reliable — product accuracy really matters to you. - You are proactive, collaborative and comfortable working with different stakeholders. - You bring energy, positivity and a willingness to learn in a fast-growing brand environment. A relevant degree (Business, Marketing, Digital, Data, Fashion Management) is nice to have, but we care more about your mindset, ambition, and eagerness to learn. What’s in it for you In this internship, you will: - Learn how an ecommerce business operates across multiple markets. - Develop strong merchandising skills used across the digital retail industry. - Become fluent in performance analysis, reporting, KPI interpretation and trading decisions. - Understand how content, product, operations, and marketing integrate to drive online results. - Gain hands-on experience working with enterprise ecommerce platforms and analytics tools. - Build relationships across an international, cross‑functional environment. At the end of your internship , you will have a strong understanding of ecommerce merchandising fundamentals, digital trading best practices, and real experience contributing to the growth of a premium performance running brand. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ​ Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260202-0007

Altra è alla ricerca di un Ecommerce Merchandising Intern per entrare a far parte del team Digital a Stabio e supportare la crescita di uno dei brand in più rapida ascesa nel settore del running. Supporta le operazioni quotidiane dell'e-commerce EMEA di Altra assicurando che i prodotti giusti siano visibili, individuabili e performanti online. Analizzerai le performance, migliorerai la presentazione dei prodotti, ottimizzerai l'esperienza del sito e contribuirai a offrire un percorso online di alta qualità ai runner di tutta la regione. Preparati ad avere un impatto! Come eCommerce Merchandising Intern, tu: - Sosterrai la configurazione e l'ottimizzazione degli assortimenti di prodotti in tutta la EMEA, garantendo precisione e coerenza. - Monitorerai le performance dei prodotti online (sell through, conversione, disponibilità) e fornirai insight utili al team. - Gestirai il merchandising on-site includendo aggiornamenti delle categorie, ranking dei prodotti, ottimizzazione della ricerca e aggiornamenti della homepage. - Coordinerai le esigenze di contenuto dei prodotti con i team Brand, Studio e Copy per garantire una presentazione premium dei prodotti. - Assisterai con la readiness go-to-market, inclusi i lanci stagionali e i momenti commerciali chiave. - Contribuirai a progetti e-commerce più ampi, iniziative interfunzionali e miglioramenti dell'esperienza digitale. Come farai la differenza - Sei fluente in inglese con forti capacità di comunicazione scritta e verbale. - Sei genuinamente curioso dell'e-commerce, dei percorsi dei consumatori e delle performance digitali. - Hai un forte pensiero analitico e ami lavorare con numeri, tendenze e dashboard. - Sei organizzato, attento ai dettagli e affidabile — la precisione dei prodotti è davvero importante per te. - Sei proattivo, collaborativo e a tuo agio nel lavorare con diversi stakeholder. - Porti energia, positività e voglia di imparare in un ambiente di brand in rapida crescita. Cosa otterrai In questo stage, imparerai: - Come funziona un'attività di e-commerce su più mercati. - Competenze di merchandising digitale. - Analisi delle performance, reportistica e interpretazione dei KPI. - Come contenuti, prodotti, operazioni e marketing si integrano per ottenere risultati online. - Esperienza pratica con piattaforme di e-commerce enterprise e strumenti di analisi. - Relazioni in un ambiente internazionale e interfunzionale. Il programma di stage EMEA di VF è un percorso di 12 mesi. Potrai godere di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui brand VF - Palestra in sede - Mensa sovvenzionata e aree relax con bevande gratuite - Navetta o sconto sui trasporti pubblici - Una vivace comunità di stagisti. Sei pronto? Candidati ora! #readytoapply R-20260202-0007
descriptionByLocale.de: Sei ein Träumer, mach den Unterschied! Tritt dem #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz, als eCommerce Merchandising Intern für Altra bei. Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das beste Bekleidungs-, Schuhwerk- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen der Welt zu sein, und treibt ikonische Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland® voran. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com . Wichtige Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1.850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz - Optimierter Bewerbungsprozess: 3 Interviews Eignungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 deinen Abschluss machen ODER im Juni 2026 Studentenstatus haben - Du musst die EU- oder EWR-Staatsbürgerschaft besitzen Sprechen wir über die Stelle! Bist du bereit, dabei zu helfen zu gestalten, wie Läufer in der EMEA-Region das innovativste Laufschuhwerk der Welt entdecken und kaufen? Altra sucht einen Ecommerce Merchandising Intern für das Digital-Team in Stabio, um das Wachstum einer der am schnellsten wachsenden Marken in der Laufbranche zu unterstützen. Unterstütze den täglichen Betrieb des EMEA-E-Commerce von Altra, indem du sicherstellst, dass die richtigen Produkte online sichtbar, auffindbar und leistungsstark sind. Als eCommerce Merchandising Intern wirst du: - Die Einrichtung und Optimierung von Produktsortimenten in der EMEA-Region unterstützen. - Die Online-Produktleistung überwachen (Sell-through, Konversion, Verfügbarkeit) und verwertbare Einblicke liefern. - Das Onsite-Merchandising verwalten, einschließlich Kategorie-Updates, Produkt-Ranking, Suchoptimierung und Homepage-Updates. - Produktinhaltsbedarf mit Brand-, Studio- und Copy-Teams koordinieren. - Bei der Go-to-Market-Bereitschaft assistieren, einschließlich saisonaler Launches. - Zu breiteren E-Commerce-Projekten und funktionsübergreifenden Initiativen beitragen. Wie du den Unterschied machst - Fließend Englisch mit starken schriftlichen und verbalen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Echtes Interesse an E-Commerce, Consumer Journeys und digitaler Performance. - Starkes analytisches Denken und Freude an der Arbeit mit Zahlen und Dashboards. - Organisiert, detailorientiert und zuverlässig. - Proaktiv, kollaborativ und sicher im Umgang mit verschiedenen Stakeholdern. Was du dafür bekommst - Wie ein E-Commerce-Geschäft über mehrere Märkte funktioniert. - Starke Merchandising-Fähigkeiten für die digitale Retail-Branche. - Performance-Analyse, Reporting und KPI-Interpretation. - Praktische Erfahrung mit Enterprise-E-Commerce-Plattformen. Außerdem genießt du: - Hybride Arbeitspolitik - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort - Subventionierte Kantine - Shuttlebus oder ÖPNV-Rabatt - Lebhafte Praktikantengemeinschaft. Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt! #readytoapply R-20260202-0007
descriptionByLocale.fr: Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram au siège EMEA à Stabio, en Suisse, en tant qu'eCommerce Merchandising Intern pour Altra. À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise mondiale de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, propulsant des marques de style de vie actif emblématiques comme The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com . Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1 850 CHF - Lieu : Siège EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens Conditions d'éligibilité - Vous devez être diplômé(e) après le 1er mai 2026 OU avoir le statut d'étudiant(e) en juin 2026 - Vous devez être citoyen(ne) de l'UE ou de l'EEE Parlons du poste ! Altra recherche un(e) Ecommerce Merchandising Intern pour rejoindre notre équipe Digital à Stabio et soutenir la croissance de l'une des marques à la croissance la plus rapide dans l'industrie du running. Soutenez les opérations quotidiennes de l'e-commerce EMEA d'Altra en veillant à ce que les bons produits soient visibles, trouvables et performants en ligne. Comment vous ferez la différence - Maîtrise de l'anglais avec de solides compétences de communication. - Curiosité pour l'e-commerce, les parcours consommateurs et la performance digitale. - Fort esprit analytique et goût pour les chiffres et les tableaux de bord. - Organisé(e), soucieux(se) du détail et fiable. - Proactif(ve), collaboratif(ve) et à l'aise avec différentes parties prenantes. Ce que vous y gagnez - Comment fonctionne un commerce e-commerce sur plusieurs marchés. - Solides compétences en merchandising digital. - Analyse des performances, reporting et interprétation des KPIs. - Expérience pratique avec des plateformes e-commerce enterprise. Vous profiterez de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50 % de réduction sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur site - Cantine subventionnée - Navette ou réduction sur les transports - Communauté de stagiaires dynamique. jobs.title: Sustainability Specialist
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: VF Corporation is looking for a Sustainability Specialist to join our Global Sustainability team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As a Sustainability Specialist , you’ll be working across VF and its portfolio of brands to drive transformative change in alignment with our Global Sustainability strategy and forthcoming regulatory requirements, with a particular emphasis on support to Brand sustainability operations. This role will be central to driving progress globally that contributes to VF’s global sustainability goals and prepares VF brands for sustainability-related regulatory compliance. The role will require adept relationship building skills across both internal and external stakeholders, giving you the opportunity to engage in multiple workstreams across VF’s organization. The Sustainability Specialist will be working closely with the VF Brands to support on the implementation of strategically relevant sustainability initiatives and processes. We expect that you will deliver exceptional results while fulfilling the following aspects of the Sustainability Analyst role: - Support on packaging initiatives across EMEA Brands, leading the implementation of existing programs & identifying, planning and executing new improvement opportunities across Brands in collaboration with internal stakeholder network, all in close alignment with eco-modulation opportunities globally foreseen by regulation. - Support VF Brands and commercial teams in fulfilling product sustainability surveys and data requests for key commercial partners. - Advising VF Brands on environmental claims and messaging, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements in EMEA (including but not limited to Empowering Consumers for the Green Transition Directive) - Support the team in the integration of circular economy principles into the day-to-day business, including support on data collection to ensure compliance with Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation ( ESPR) and Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) - Continuously monitor the evolving landscape of sustainability-focused regulatory requirements globally. - Support on team organization, planning, and day-to-day operational tasks. Critical work relationships: - Work horizontally across internal functions, incl. but not exclusive to Global Sustainability, Legal, Brand Marketing, Brand Product & Sales teams, Finance, Government Affairs, Supply Chain, Product Stewardship team as well as external stakeholders - Work closely with Corporate & Government Affairs and Legal Counsel to continuously integrate regulatory developments into the VF operational process. Skills for Success We are looking for someone who: - A few years of work experience in sustainability, experience in the textile industry is a plus. - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Has excellent analytical skills & process thinking to translate complex issues into tangible & streamlined solutions. - Has deep expertise in data collection and analytics, process management and project management. - Has the ability to successfully support and prioritize multiple projects and teams at one time. - Has a pioneering spirit and feels confident in their ability to charter unchartered territory. - Is a strong communicator and enjoys working with people. - Has a keen interest in Sustainability, Climate Change, and the complex, interrelated environmental challenges faced by our industry and beyond. About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. What’s in it For You We’re in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That’s why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we’re the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005

descriptionByLocale.it: VF Corporation è alla ricerca di un/una Sustainability Specialist per entrare a far parte del nostro team Global Sustainability con sede a Stabio, in Svizzera. Parliamo del ruolo! Come Sustainability Specialist, lavorerai trasversalmente in VF e nel suo portfolio di brand per guidare un cambiamento trasformativo in linea con la nostra strategia globale di sostenibilità e i futuri requisiti normativi, con particolare enfasi sul supporto alle operazioni di sostenibilità dei Brand. Questo ruolo sarà fondamentale per guidare i progressi a livello globale che contribuiscono agli obiettivi di sostenibilità globale di VF e preparano i brand VF alla conformità normativa in materia di sostenibilità. Il ruolo richiederà eccellenti capacità di costruzione di relazioni con stakeholder sia interni che esterni, offrendoti l'opportunità di impegnarti in molteplici flussi di lavoro all'interno dell'organizzazione VF. Lo Sustainability Specialist lavorerà a stretto contatto con i Brand VF per supportare l'implementazione di iniziative e processi di sostenibilità strategicamente rilevanti. Ci aspettiamo che tu fornisca risultati eccellenti svolgendo i seguenti aspetti del ruolo di Sustainability Analyst: - Supportare le iniziative di packaging nei Brand EMEA, guidando l'implementazione dei programmi esistenti e identificando, pianificando ed eseguendo nuove opportunità di miglioramento nei Brand in collaborazione con la rete interna di stakeholder, in stretto allineamento con le opportunità di ecomodulazione previste a livello globale dalla normativa. - Supportare i Brand VF e i team commerciali nell'adempimento di survey sulla sostenibilità dei prodotti e richieste di dati da parte dei principali partner commerciali. - Consigliare i Brand VF sulle dichiarazioni e la messaggistica ambientale, garantendo la conformità con i requisiti normativi in EMEA (inclusa ma non limitata alla Direttiva che responsabilizza i consumatori per la transizione verde). - Supportare il team nell'integrazione dei principi dell'economia circolare nell'attività quotidiana, incluso il supporto alla raccolta dati per garantire la conformità al Regolamento sull'Ecodesign per Prodotti Sostenibili (ESPR) e alla Direttiva sulla rendicontazione di sostenibilità delle imprese (CSRD). - Monitorare continuamente l'evoluzione del panorama normativo globale in materia di sostenibilità. - Supportare l'organizzazione del team, la pianificazione e le attività operative quotidiane. Relazioni di lavoro fondamentali: - Lavorare trasversalmente nelle funzioni interne, incluse ma non esclusive a Global Sustainability, Legal, Brand Marketing, Brand Product & Sales teams, Finance, Government Affairs, Supply Chain, Product Stewardship team e stakeholder esterni. - Lavorare a stretto contatto con Corporate & Government Affairs e Legal Counsel per integrare continuamente gli sviluppi normativi nel processo operativo di VF. Competenze per il successo Stiamo cercando qualcuno che: - Abbia qualche anno di esperienza lavorativa nella sostenibilità; l'esperienza nel settore tessile è un plus. - Sia fluente in inglese con eccellenti capacità di comunicazione verbale e scritta. - Abbia eccellenti capacità analitiche e pensiero orientato ai processi per tradurre questioni complesse in soluzioni concrete e semplificate. - Abbia una profonda esperienza nella raccolta e analisi dei dati, nella gestione dei processi e nella gestione dei progetti. - Sappia supportare e dare priorità a più progetti e team contemporaneamente. - Abbia uno spirito pionieristico e si senta sicuro nella capacità di esplorare territori inesplorati. - Sia un comunicatore efficace e ami lavorare con le persone. - Abbia un forte interesse per la Sostenibilità, il Cambiamento Climatico e le complesse sfide ambientali del settore. Chi è VF VF è un'azienda globale di abbigliamento che connette le persone agli stili di vita che amano attraverso la nostra famiglia di brand iconici. Al centro del nostro percorso c'è il nostro scopo: alimentiamo i movimenti di stili di vita sostenibili e attivi per il bene delle persone e del pianeta. Cosa otterrai Offriamo benefit completi che favoriscono il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario per tutti i collaboratori VF: - Una cultura di feedback supportiva dove rispetto e integrità ci guidano - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo con persone di diversi background e nazionalità - Far parte di un brand di stile di vita iconico in un'organizzazione multi-brand e multi-paese - Palestra in sede con iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Una carta sconto del 50% su tutti i brand VF - Aree relax con bevande calde gratuite Liberi di essere, Inclusione e Diversità In quanto datore di lavoro che garantisce pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Se ti è piaciuto quello che hai letto e vuoi unirti al nostro team, ci farebbe piacere sentirti! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005
descriptionByLocale.de: VF Corporation sucht einen/eine Sustainability Specialist, der/die unserem Global Sustainability-Team mit Sitz in Stabio, Schweiz, beitritt. Sprechen wir über die Stelle! Als Sustainability Specialist wirst du übergreifend in VF und seinem Markenportfolio arbeiten, um transformativen Wandel im Einklang mit unserer globalen Nachhaltigkeitsstrategie und kommenden regulatorischen Anforderungen voranzutreiben, mit besonderem Fokus auf die Unterstützung der Nachhaltigkeitsoperationen der Marken. Diese Rolle ist zentral für den globalen Fortschritt in Richtung VFs Nachhaltigkeitsziele und die Vorbereitung der VF-Marken auf nachhaltigkeitsbezogene regulatorische Compliance. Die Rolle erfordert ausgeprägte Fähigkeiten zum Aufbau von Beziehungen mit internen und externen Stakeholdern und gibt dir die Möglichkeit, in mehreren Workstreams innerhalb der VF-Organisation mitzuwirken. Der/Die Sustainability Specialist wird eng mit den VF-Marken zusammenarbeiten, um die Implementierung strategisch relevanter Nachhaltigkeitsinitiativen und -prozesse zu unterstützen. Wir erwarten, dass du herausragende Ergebnisse erzielst, indem du folgende Aspekte der Sustainability Analyst-Rolle erfüllst: - Unterstützung bei Verpackungsinitiativen für EMEA-Marken, Leitung der Implementierung bestehender Programme sowie Identifizierung, Planung und Umsetzung neuer Verbesserungsmöglichkeiten in enger Abstimmung mit global vorgesehenen Ökomodulationsmöglichkeiten. - Unterstützung der VF-Marken und Vertriebsteams bei der Erfüllung von Produktnachhaltigkeitsumfragen und Datenanfragen. - Beratung der VF-Marken zu Umweltbehauptungen und -botschaften unter Einhaltung regulatorischer Anforderungen in EMEA. - Unterstützung des Teams bei der Integration von Kreislaufwirtschaftsprinzipien, einschließlich Datenerhebung für ESPR und CSRD-Compliance. - Kontinuierliche Überwachung des sich entwickelnden Nachhaltigkeitsregulierungsumfelds global. - Unterstützung bei Teamorganisation, Planung und täglichen operativen Aufgaben. Kritische Arbeitsbeziehungen: - Horizontale Zusammenarbeit mit internen Funktionen, einschließlich aber nicht begrenzt auf Global Sustainability, Legal, Brand Marketing, Finance, Government Affairs, Supply Chain, Product Stewardship und externe Stakeholder. - Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Corporate & Government Affairs und Legal Counsel zur Integration regulatorischer Entwicklungen. Fähigkeiten für den Erfolg Wir suchen jemanden mit: - Einigen Jahren Berufserfahrung im Nachhaltigkeitsbereich; Erfahrung in der Textilindustrie ist ein Plus. - Fließenden Englischkenntnissen mit ausgezeichneten Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Ausgezeichneten analytischen Fähigkeiten und Prozessdenken. - Tiefgreifender Expertise in Datenerhebung, Prozessmanagement und Projektmanagement. - Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte und Teams gleichzeitig zu priorisieren. - Pioniergeist und Selbstvertrauen in unbekanntem Terrain. - Starken Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Freude an der Teamarbeit. - Starkem Interesse an Nachhaltigkeit und Klimawandel. Über VF VF ist ein globales Bekleidungsunternehmen, das Menschen mit den Lebensstilen verbindet, die sie schätzen. Was du dafür bekommst - Eine unterstützende Feedbackkultur auf Basis von Respekt und Integrität - Ein integratives internationales Umfeld mit Menschen unterschiedlicher Hintergründe - Teil einer ikonischen Lifestyle-Marke in einer Multi-Brand-Organisation - Fitnessstudio vor Ort - 50% Rabattkarte auf alle VF-Marken - Pausenräume mit kostenlosen Heißgetränken. Wenn dir gefällt, was du gelesen hast, würden wir gerne von dir hören! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005
descriptionByLocale.fr: VF Corporation recherche un(e) Sustainability Specialist pour rejoindre notre équipe Global Sustainability basée à Stabio, en Suisse. Parlons du poste ! En tant que Sustainability Specialist, vous travaillerez à travers VF et son portefeuille de marques pour conduire un changement transformateur en alignement avec notre stratégie mondiale de développement durable et les futures exigences réglementaires, avec un accent particulier sur le soutien aux opérations de durabilité des Marques. Ce rôle sera central pour faire progresser les objectifs de durabilité globale de VF et préparer les marques VF à la conformité réglementaire en matière de durabilité. Le rôle nécessitera de solides compétences en développement de relations avec les parties prenantes internes et externes, vous donnant l'opportunité de vous impliquer dans de multiples flux de travail au sein de l'organisation VF. Le/La Sustainability Specialist travaillera en étroite collaboration avec les Marques VF pour soutenir la mise en œuvre d'initiatives et de processus de durabilité stratégiquement pertinents. Nous attendons que vous obteniez des résultats exceptionnels en remplissant les aspects suivants du rôle : - Soutenir les initiatives d'emballage pour les Marques EMEA, en menant la mise en œuvre des programmes existants et en identifiant, planifiant et exécutant de nouvelles opportunités d'amélioration en étroite collaboration avec le réseau de parties prenantes internes, en alignement avec les opportunités d'écomodulation prévues par la réglementation. - Soutenir les Marques VF et les équipes commerciales dans l'accomplissement des enquêtes sur la durabilité des produits et des demandes de données des principaux partenaires commerciaux. - Conseiller les Marques VF sur les déclarations et messages environnementaux, en assurant la conformité avec les exigences réglementaires en EMEA (y compris la Directive responsabilisant les consommateurs pour la transition écologique). - Soutenir l'équipe dans l'intégration des principes d'économie circulaire, y compris la collecte de données pour la conformité au Règlement sur l'écoconception pour des produits durables (ESPR) et à la Directive sur la publication d'informations en matière de durabilité par les entreprises (CSRD). - Surveiller en continu l'évolution du paysage réglementaire mondial en matière de durabilité. - Soutenir l'organisation de l'équipe, la planification et les tâches opérationnelles quotidiennes. Relations de travail critiques : - Travailler de manière transversale avec les fonctions internes, notamment Global Sustainability, Legal, Brand Marketing, Finance, Government Affairs, Supply Chain, Product Stewardship et parties prenantes externes. - Travailler en étroite collaboration avec Corporate & Government Affairs et Legal Counsel pour intégrer continuellement les développements réglementaires. Compétences pour réussir Nous recherchons quelqu'un qui : - A quelques années d'expérience professionnelle en durabilité ; l'expérience dans l'industrie textile est un plus. - Maîtrise l'anglais avec d'excellentes compétences de communication verbale et écrite. - A d'excellentes compétences analytiques et une réflexion orientée processus. - A une expertise approfondie en collecte de données, gestion des processus et gestion de projet. - Sait soutenir et prioriser plusieurs projets et équipes simultanément. - A un esprit pionnier et confiance en sa capacité à explorer des territoires inconnus. - Est un(e) communicant(e) efficace et aime travailler avec les gens. - A un vif intérêt pour la Durabilité, le Changement Climatique et les défis environnementaux complexes. À propos de VF VF est une entreprise mondiale de vêtements qui connecte les gens aux modes de vie qu'ils chérissent. Ce que vous y gagnez - Une culture de feedback basée sur le respect et l'intégrité - Un environnement international inclusif - Faire partie d'une marque de style de vie iconique dans une organisation multi-marques - Salle de sport sur site - Une carte de réduction de 50% sur toutes les marques VF - Espaces de détente avec boissons chaudes gratuites. Si ce que vous avez lu vous plaît et que vous souhaitez rejoindre notre équipe, nous serions ravis de vous entendre ! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005

requirements: A few years of work experience in sustainability, experience in the textile industry is a plus.
Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Has excellent analytical skills & process thinking to translate complex issues into tangible & streamlined solutions.
